# meok-watermark-attest-mcp
# **EU AI Act Article 50 watermarking + transparency MCP. Built for the 2 November 2026 cliff.**

## Install
```bash
pip install meok-watermark-attest-mcp
```

## Auth & Rate Limits
- Free tier: 10 calls/day. No API key required.
- Pro tier (£79/mo): unlimited + signed attestations.
- Enterprise (£1,499/mo): white-label.

## Tools

### `get_deadline_status`
Return live status of the 2 Aug 2026 Article 50 deadline + which Article

### `classify_obligations`
Given system characteri

### `generate_disclosure_text`
Generate compliant disclosure text for a specific Article 50 obligation.

### `audit_content_pipeline`
Audit an existing content-generation pipeline for Article 50 compliance.

### `sign_watermark_attestation`
Generate a HMAC-SHA256 signed attestation of Article 50 compliance for a

### `c2pa_generate_manifest`
Generate a draft C2PA Content Credentials manifest (JSON-LD) for an

### `c2pa_validate_manifest`
Validate a C2PA manifest (JSON-LD) against required fields per the C2PA

### `perceptual_fingerprint_compute`
Compute a perceptual fingerprint suitable for the EU AI Act Article 50

### `synthid_check`
Check whether a SynthID-class detector output indicates an AI-generated


## Maintainer
MEOK AI Labs · hello@meok.ai · https://meok.ai · MIT licensed

## Pairs with
Governance moat: pair this tool with any of MEOK's 38 governance MCPs (EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, GDPR, ISO 42001, etc.) for full compliance coverage.
